<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 512 512" width="512" height="512">
  <!-- Face -->
  <circle cx="256" cy="256" r="180" fill="#fff8e1" stroke="#333" stroke-width="8" />
  
  <!-- Eyes (Wide and darting) -->
  <ellipse cx="200" cy="220" rx="25" ry="30" fill="white" stroke="#333" stroke-width="4" />
  <ellipse cx="312" cy="220" rx="25" ry="30" fill="white" stroke="#333" stroke-width="4" />
  <circle cx="210" cy="220" r="8" fill="black" />
  <circle cx="322" cy="220" r="8" fill="black" />

  <!-- Eyebrows (Slanted/Worried) -->
  <path d="M170 180 Q200 160 230 185" fill="none" stroke="#333" stroke-width="6" stroke-linecap="round" />
  <path d="M282 185 Q312 160 342 180" fill="none" stroke="#333" stroke-width="6" stroke-linecap="round" />

  <!-- Mouth (Wavy/Trembling) -->
  <path d="M190 340 Q210 320 230 340 T270 340 T310 340 T350 340" fill="none" stroke="#333" stroke-width="6" stroke-linecap="round" />

  <!-- Sweat Drop -->
  <path d="M380 180 Q395 180 395 200 Q395 215 380 215 Q365 215 365 200 Q365 180 380 180" fill="#add8e6" stroke="#4682b4" stroke-width="2" />

  <!-- Shaking Lines -->
  <path d="M60 230 L40 250 M60 270 L40 290" fill="none" stroke="#ccc" stroke-width="4" stroke-linecap="round" />
  <path d="M452 230 L472 250 M452 270 L472 290" fill="none" stroke="#ccc" stroke-width="4" stroke-linecap="round" />
</svg>

messages.content:
You are a drawing agent in a one-word guessing game.
Return JSON only, with a single field: svg.

Rules:
1) Draw the target word using only SVG graphics.
2) Output one complete <svg>...</svg> string.
3) Do not include text labels, letters, or numbers in the drawing.
4) Keep the SVG simple and valid. No scripts, no foreignObject.
5) Use a 512x512 canvas.

Output schema:
{ "svg": "string" }

messages.content:
You are the guesser in a visual one-word guessing game.
Return JSON only, with a single field: guesses.

Rules:
1) You receive one JPEG image of a drawing.
2) Return exactly 20 one-word guesses in order of confidence (best guess first).
3) The order is important and will be scored by first correct position.
4) Do not repeat guesses.
5) Each guess must be EN-US one word, no spaces.
6) Avoid punctuation and numbers.

Output schema:
{ "guesses": ["string", "... exactly 20 items ..."] }

content.text: {"language":"EN-US","maxHints":20,"note":"Return 20 ordered guesses. Position 1 is the highest-confidence guess."}
